patch.value: As a third-party package author, I want first-party capability exemplars and pm_min_version models, so that I can copy working patterns for importers/hooks/search and version compat
As a third-party package author, I want first-party capability exemplars and pm_min_version models, so that I can copy working patterns for importers/hooks/search and version compat
importers/hooks/search capabilities each have a tested first-party exemplar; all first-party manifests declare pm_min_version; SDK.md references them

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Partial progress (this PR, branch sdk-package-version-bounds-and-testing-helpers-20260531): (1) all 8 first-party manifests now declare pm_min_version (pm-nf2q closed) — the version-compat model exemplar is done; (2) SDK testing helpers now cover hooks/search-providers/importers/exporters (pm-kfd8 closed). REMAINING for full closure: real first-party CAPABILITY exemplars for importers/hooks/search — tracked by pm-13bn (importer/exporter migration) and pm-bqpg (search-provider exemplar). Finding from pm-kfd8: NO first-party package currently registers an importer/exporter/search-provider/hook (only commands/flags/services), so those two items are the remaining exemplar work. Keeping this story open until pm-13bn/pm-bqpg land.
